user.title: Set up ёRadio
user.description: Configure your yoRadio device. The MQTT root topic must match the one set in your yoRadio firmware.

data_description.root_topic: The MQTT topic prefix used by your yoRadio device (e.g. "yoradio").
data_description.max_volume: Maximum raw volume value reported by your device. Default is 254.

abort.already_configured: This MQTT root topic is already configured.
